name: wots_sign(M, SK.seed, PK.seed, ADRS)
label: Algorithm 7

inputs.name: SK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte secret seed from SLH-DSA private key

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: ADRS
inputs.description: 32-byte address structure, type set to WOTS_HASH with layer, tree, and key pair addresses set

outputs.name: sig
outputs.description: len * n-byte WOTS+ signature, array of len n-byte chain values

body_raw: for i from 0 to len1 - 1 do
msg ← msg ∥ base_2b(toByte(csum, ⌈len2 * lgw / 8⌉), lgw, len2)
for i from 0 to len - 1 do
